name: Ark UI (Headless UI Components for React/Vue/Solid)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Segun Adebayo / Chakra UI team

performance.notes: Headless — rendering performance depends on styling

agent_readiness.notes: Headless UI component library from Chakra UI creators. React/Vue/Solid support from same codebase. Components: DatePicker, Dialog, Select, Combobox, Menu, Popover, ColorPicker, FileUpload, PinInput, Rating, Slider, NumberInput, etc. Built on Zag.js state machines. @ark-ui/react or @ark-ui/vue or @ark-ui/solid. Fully accessible (WAI-ARIA). Unstyled — bring your own CSS. Park UI for pre-styled version. Alternative to Radix UI with broader framework support.

gotchas: Still maturing — some components less battle-tested than Radix
Zag.js state machine API can be verbose for custom extensions
Vue/Solid support may lag React on new components
best_when: Multi-framework design systems (React + Vue + Solid from same components)
Teams wanting Radix-like quality with Vue/Solid support
Chakra UI ecosystem users building custom design systems
avoid_when: When pre-built styling needed (use shadcn/ui or Park UI)
Simple UI needs (individual component libraries simpler)
summary: Ark UI provides headless, accessible UI components for React, Vue, and Solid from one codebase (built on Zag.js state machines). DatePicker, Combobox, ColorPicker, Dialog, Menu — 40+ components. WAI-ARIA compliant. Unstyled. Park UI for pre-styled version. Alternative to Radix UI with Vue/Solid support. From the Chakra UI team.
